diagrams.title: Configuration Management Process Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the flow of activities from CI identification through control, status accounting, and verification
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the cyclic nature of configuration management activities

diagrams.title: CMDB Architecture and Relationships
diagrams.description: Illustrates how CMDB stores CIs and their relationships within the IT infrastructure
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how configuration data is organized and accessed

diagrams.title: CI Hierarchy Example
diagrams.description: Shows parent-child relationships between configuration items in a typical IT environment
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how CIs are structured and related hierarchically
